_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Provide tactical overwatch alongside an operator during execution on infrastructure handoffs/transitions.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct post-deployment model monitoring, identifying performance degradation, data drift, and conditions requiring model retraining or replacement.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. AI-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-007 (DG, cosine: 0.402), AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.397).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.1/10 (raw 0.115). No substantive shared vocabulary — relationship is purely semantic. DCWF-only terms [alongside, execution, handoffs, infrastructure, operator, overwatch] vs WIDAI-only terms [conditions, conduct, data, degradation, deployment, drift] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.859 (P=0.860, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Provide tactical overwatch alongside an operator during execution on infrastruct" and "Conduct post-deployment model monitoring, identifying performance degradation, d" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.417 > STS 0.115 (gap +0.303). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [none] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 0.0%. Zero substantive shared tokens. The entire relationship is semantic — no lexical trace. DCWF terms: [alongside, execution, handoffs, infrastructure, operator, overwatch]. WIDAI terms: [conditions, conduct, data, degradation, deployment, drift].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.303 with low STS 0.115. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
